scripts.desktop: npm run build -w @brian-code/desktop && npm run start -w @brian-code/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: DESKTOP_DEV=1 npm run build:electron -w @brian-code/desktop && concurrently "npm run dev:renderer -w @brian-code/desktop" "DESKTOP_DEV=1 npm run start -w @brian-code/desktop"
scripts.test: npm run test -w @brian-code/agent && npm run test -w @brian-code/chat-store
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w @brian-code/agent && npm run build -w @brian-code/chat-store && tsc -p apps/cli --noEmit && tsc -p apps/desktop --noEmit && tsc -p apps/desktop/tsconfig.electron.json --noEmit
